LanguageData.Megascarab.description: A massive ant swollen to enormous size by generations of radiation exposure. Its powerful mandibles can shear through bone, and it will fight to the death for its colony.
LanguageData.Megascarab.label: hiigeltööline ant
LanguageData.Megaspider.description: Hiidsipelgatest kõige agressiivsem. Need olendid kaitsevad oma taru järeleandmatu raevukalt ja võimsate lõugadega.
LanguageData.Megaspider.label: hiiglaslik sõdur ant
LanguageData.Spelopede.description: Maa-aluseks eluks kohandatud hiiglaslik sipelgas. Selle karm eksoskelett ja kaevamisvõime teevad sellest tohutu tunnelielaniku.
LanguageData.Spelopede.label: hiiglaslik sipelgas
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireAnt.description: Ένα κουκούλι στάσης που περιέχει ένα μυρμήγκι της φωτιάς.
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireAnt.label: κουκούλι μυρμηγκιών φωτιάς
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireSoldierAnt.description: Ένα κουκούλι στάσης που περιέχει ένα μυρμήγκι στρατιώτη της φωτιάς.
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireSoldierAnt.label: κουκούλι μυρμήγκι στρατιώτης φωτιάς
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireWorkerAnt.description: Ένα κουκούλι στάσης που περιέχει ένα μυρμήγκι εργάτη της πυρκαγιάς.
LanguageData.Arktos_CocoonFireWorkerAnt.label: κουκούλι μυρμηγκιών πυροσβεστών
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.description: Ένα μυρμήγκι της φωτιάς προσαρμοσμένο για υπόγεια ζωή. Τα νύχια του που σκάβουν και ο συντονισμός της κυψέλης το καθιστούν έναν τρομερό κάτοικο σήραγγας.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.label: μυρμήγκι της φωτιάς
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.tools.0.label: νύχι κεφαλής
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAnt.tools.1.label: κεφάλι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.description: Ένα φτερωτό μυρμήγκι φωτιάς που εκτράφηκε για πτήσεις ζευγαρώματος και ανίχνευση. Από μόνο του είναι εύθραυστο, αλλά τα σμήνη από drones εξακολουθούν να είναι επικίνδυνα.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.label: πυροσβεστικό drone
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.tools.0.label: γνάθους
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntDrone.tools.1.label: κεφάλι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntHive.description: Μια κυψέλη από γιγάντια μυρμήγκια φωτιάς. Εάν ενεργοποιηθεί, θα γεννήσει επιπλέον μυρμήγκια και κυψέλες με την πάροδο του χρόνου, καθώς και πολύτιμο ζελέ από έντομα.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntHive.label: κυψέλη μυρμήγκι της φωτιάς
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.description: Το νεανικό στάδιο ενός μυρμηγκιού της φωτιάς. Οι προνύμφες των μυρμηγκιών της φωτιάς γαλουχούνται από εργάτες και ωριμάζουν στην επόμενη κάστα της κυψέλης.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.label: προνύμφη μυρμηγκιών της φωτιάς
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.tools.0.label: γνάθους
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntLarva.tools.1.label: κεφάλι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.description: Η βασίλισσα ενός μυρμηγκιού της φωτιάς megahive. Αγκυρώνει την αποικία, στήνει την επόμενη γενιά και μετατρέπει οποιαδήποτε φωλιά στην οποία επιζεί σε μεγαλύτερη απειλή.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.label: βασίλισσα του μυρμηγκιού της φωτιάς
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.tools.0.label: νύχι κεφαλής
LanguageData.Arktos_FireAntQueen.tools.1.label: κεφάλι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.description: Το πιο επιθετικό από τα μυρμήγκια της φωτιάς. Αυτά τα πλάσματα υπερασπίζονται την κυψέλη τους με αδυσώπητη αγριότητα, χοντρή χιτίνη και ισχυρά σαγόνια.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.label: φωτιά στρατιώτης μυρμήγκι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.tools.0.label: νύχι κεφαλής
LanguageData.Arktos_FireSoldierAnt.tools.1.label: κεφάλι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.description: Ένα τεράστιο μυρμήγκι φωτιάς σχεδιασμένο για δύναμη και ανθεκτικότητα. Τα μυρμήγκια των πυροσβεστών είναι σκληρά εδαφικά και διατηρούν την κυψέλη τους με απόλυτη πίστη.
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.label: πυροσβέστης μυρμήγκι
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.tools.0.label: γνάθους
LanguageData.Arktos_FireWorkerAnt.tools.1.label: κεφάλι
LanguageData.Fish_Salmon.description: Tumedate soomuste ja rikkaliku lihaga rändkala, levinud kohtades, kus külmad jõed kohtuvad merega.
LanguageData.Fish_Salmon.label: suitsulõhe
LanguageData.Fish_Bass.description: Tavaline magevee kiskja, kes on tuntud äkiliste löökide ja maheda maitsega liha poolest.
LanguageData.Fish_Bass.label: keti korjaja
LanguageData.Fish_Tilapia.description: Vastupidav mageveekala, mida leidub soojades jõgedes ja tiikides, sageli õitseb seal, kus puhtamad liigid ei suuda.
LanguageData.Fish_Tilapia.label: närtsinud radeye
LanguageData.Fish_Cod.description: Paksude soomustega ja jäiga seljaharjaga külmavee rannikukala, mida hinnatakse tugeva valge liha poolest.
LanguageData.Fish_Cod.label: soomuskala
LanguageData.Fish_Bluefish.description: Kiire rannikukütt, kes jälitab karmi ilmaga ja avasurfiga söödakoole.
LanguageData.Fish_Bluefish.label: tormiujuja
LanguageData.Fish_Guppy.description: Väike mageveeliik, mida hinnatakse oma ebatavaliste kortsuliste lõpuste pärast; söödav, kuid liiga väike, et anda palju liha.
LanguageData.Fish_Guppy.label: aksolotl
LanguageData.Fish_Frostfish.description: Suur kahvatu liha ja raske kehaga külmaveekala, mida leidub tavaliselt sügavates liustikust toituvates jõgedes.
LanguageData.Fish_Frostfish.label: potbelly kelt
LanguageData.Fish_Catfish.description: Suur vurruga põhjasöötur, mis pimeduse järel luurab mudastel kanalites ja üleujutatud varemetes.
LanguageData.Fish_Catfish.label: verevurru
LanguageData.Fish_Piranha.description: Väike, kuid agressiivne teravate hammaste ja võimsate lõugadega mageveekala, mida püütakse sageli trofeeliikidena.
LanguageData.Fish_Piranha.label: kanawha piraaja
LanguageData.Fish_Dogfish.description: Väike hailaadne kareda naha ja teravate hammastega rannakala, levinud piki kiviseid rannajooni.
LanguageData.Fish_Dogfish.label: saehammas
LanguageData.Fish_Marlin.description: Tohutu oda meenutava koonuga avaveekütt, hinnatud kui ohtlik trofeesaak.
LanguageData.Fish_Marlin.label: surmalõua
LanguageData.Fish_Tuna.description: Suur soojadest meredest pärit rändkala, mis on tuntud õlise liha ja tugeva ja püsiva jooksu poolest.
LanguageData.Fish_Tuna.label: hariliku uime
LanguageData.Fish_Flounder.description: Lame rannikukala, kes mattub mudasse ja varitseb merepõhja saaki.
LanguageData.Fish_Flounder.label: tuhakarva varitseja
LanguageData.Fish_Toxfish.description: Reostunud vee mutantkala. Ebaturvaline toorelt, kuid siiski kasutatav madala toiteväärtusega keedetud roogades.
LanguageData.Fish_Toxfish.label: hõõguv õgimine
LanguageData.Plant_TreeDrago.description: Väändunud jäsemete ja pistodalehtedega vastupidav kõrbejucca. Vanas Mojaves tähistasid need puud kilomeetrite kaugusel teid, vett ja probleeme.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeDrago.label: joshua puu
LanguageData.Plant_TreeSnagroot.description: Mustunud, peaaegu surnud puu, mis elas üle lähedal aset leidnud aatomiplahvatuse. Koristades annab see kasina koguse puitu.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeSnagroot.label: söestunud puu
LanguageData.Ambrosia.description: A mutated fruit with thick, fibrous leaves and an unusually sweet pulp. Its natural compounds cause mild euphoria, and prolonged consumption leads to dependence. Still, it remains one of the more bearable vices the wasteland has to offer.
LanguageData.Ambrosia.label: punga puuvili
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnchovy.description: Väike hõbedane peibutuskala, kes liigub tihedates parvedes läbi jõesuudmete ja rannikumadalike.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnchovy.label: oja hõbedane
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAngelfish.description: Särav riffikala kõrgete uimedega ja terava territoriaalse käitumisega vaatamata dekoratiivsele välimusele.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAngelfish.label: päikesekarje
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnglerfish.description: Süvamere varitsuskiskja, kes ootab liikumatult pimedates basseinides, kuni saak jõuab käeulatusse.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawAnglerfish.label: raba varitseja
LanguageData.VCEF_RawClownfish.description: Varem sõjaeelsetes akvaariumides levinud vöödiline mereveekala, mida leidub nüüd soojades riffivetes.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawClownfish.label: brahfin
LanguageData.VCEF_RawEel.description: Pikk, libe kala, mis libiseb kergesti läbi pilliroo, drenaažitorude ja loodete basseinide.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawEel.label: lilla radpole
LanguageData.VCEF_RawGoldfish.description: Sõjaeelsest põgenenud varust põlvnenud heledate soomustega lihav dekoratiivne tiigikala.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawGoldfish.label: villikala
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHaddock.description: Raske külmaveekala jäiga seljaharja ja nõrgalt helendavate soomustega väheses valguses.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHaddock.label: hõõguv spinifish
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHalibut.description: Sügavatest rannikuvetest pärit tohutu lai lest, mida hinnatakse paksude lihalõikude poolest.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHalibut.label: nahkselga
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHerring.description: Kitsa kehaga parvekala, mis jookseb kiiretes külmaveeparvedes läbi suudmete ja abajate.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawHerring.label: puidust saelõikur
LanguageData.VCEF_RawKoi.description: Läikiv magevee tiigikala, mis pärineb tõenäoliselt dekoratiivsetest karpkala tüvedest.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawKoi.label: baieri ojauim
LanguageData.VCEF_RawLobster.description: Väike soomustatud koorikloom vähese lihaga, tavaliselt hautiste kaupa keedetud.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawLobster.label: mirelurk koorunud
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMackerel.description: Kiire rannikukala, mis liigub tihedates parvedes mööda muulide, riffide ja külmade surfiliinide vahel.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMackerel.label: baieri tidefin
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMinnow.description: Punase kõhuga pisike jõekala, keda haritakse tavaliselt selgetes ojades.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawMinnow.label: punane kõht
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPerch.description: Kollaste silmadega lahja mageveekütt, tavaline jahedates järvedes ja aeglastes jõgedes.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPerch.label: wallae
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPufferfish.description: Ümara kehaga kala, mis ohu korral õhkub; söödav, kuid maitse poolest mitte kõrgelt hinnatud.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawPufferfish.label: ahmiv
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSprat.description: Väike õline peibutuskala, mida leidub tihedates külmaparvedes, mis tavaliselt võrgustatakse hooajaliste rannikujooksude ajal.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSprat.label: alpikann
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSwordfish.description: Kiire avavee kiskja pika torkava koonuga ja võimsa löögiga.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawSwordfish.label: naasträstas
LanguageData.VCEF_RawTrout.description: Külmavee ulukikala, mida tavaliselt püütakse mägismaa jõgedest ja lumesulamisjärvedest.
LanguageData.VCEF_RawTrout.label: hari forell
LanguageData.MedicineUltratech.label: Vault-Tec ravim
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfDeadlifeShells.descr: Roostetanud sõjaväekast, mis on täidetud surnud elukarpidega. Need suurtükiväe padrunid on täis tolmutaolist segu, mis ladestub pärast lõhkamist lähedalasuvate inimeste ja loomade surnukehadele ning kasvatab neid metsikuteks kummitusteks ja kummitusloomadeks. Paljud kestad on kaotanud oma tugevuse, kuid mõned võivad siiski töötada.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.description: Vana, roostetanud fragment prototüüpreaktorist. Tõenäoliselt jäeti see maha, kui Moldaveri ehitusprogramm peatati. Selle võib siiski olla võimalik lahti võtta ja väärtuslikke fusioonikomponente taastada.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.label: iidne reaktori osa
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Basic.description: Termotuumasünteesi prototüüp, mis on võimeline tootma geotermilisest vundamendist suures koguses energiat. Seda saab hiljem täiustatud reaktorivariantideks täiendada, kui õiged uurimismärkmed ja riistvara on taastatud. Tuleb asetada aurugeisrile.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Basic.label: fusioonsüdamiku prototüüp
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.description: Väändunud tükk reaktori korpust ühest Moldaveri mahajäetud projektist. Väärtuslikud osad on kadunud ja kõik muu on vanarauaks lagunenud.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.label: reaktori rämps
LanguageData.Flake.label: dried brahmin shrooms
LanguageData.Flake.description: A crumbly dehydrated preparation of brahmin shrooms, dried and pressed into brittle chips. Highly addictive, producing a brief but intense euphoric rush. A common street chem among wasteland settlements.
LanguageData.GoJuice.label: destilled brahmin shrooms
LanguageData.GoJuice.description: A concentrated distillate extracted from brahmin shrooms under heat and pressure. The resulting compound dramatically sharpens reflexes and dulls pain, making the user temporarily lethal in combat. Highly addictive with severe withdrawal effects.
LanguageData.Luciferium.label: smooch
LanguageData.Luciferium.description: A mysterious pre-war compound recovered from sealed medical bunkers. Steadily enhances all physical and mental capabilities over time. The body becomes permanently dependent — missing a dose triggers a violent and ultimately fatal withdrawal. Nobody knows who made it or why.
LanguageData.Neutroamine.label: antiseptics
LanguageData.Neutroamine.description: Industrial antiseptic compounds stockpiled from pre-war medical and military supplies. Required as a base ingredient for synthesizing most wasteland drugs and medicines. Too concentrated to apply directly.
LanguageData.Penoxycyline.label: antibiotics
LanguageData.Penoxycyline.description: Pre-war antibiotics recovered from military medical kits and hospital stockpiles. Prevents common wasteland infections — bloatfly fever, bayou fungus, and the new plague — before they take hold. Must be taken every five days to remain effective.\n\nThis only prevents new infections. It does not treat existing ones, even those not yet symptomatic.
LanguageData.Plant_Psychoid.label: brahmin shrooms
LanguageData.Plant_Psychoid.description: A psychoactive mushroom variety that grows readily in brahmin waste. Mildly hallucinogenic when eaten raw, but primarily cultivated as the base ingredient for a range of stronger preparations.
LanguageData.PsychiteTea.label: brahmin shroom kombucha
LanguageData.PsychiteTea.description: A lightly fermented kombucha brewed from brahmin shrooms and water. The fermentation process mellows the psychoactive content, producing a mildly mood-lifting drink with low addiction potential. Widely consumed across settlements as a social beverage.
LanguageData.PsychoidLeaves.label: brahmin shrooms
LanguageData.PsychoidLeaves.description: Freshly harvested brahmin shrooms, still moist and pungent. Mildly psychoactive when eaten raw. Primarily used as the base ingredient for kombucha, dried chips, and more refined chem preparations.
LanguageData.WakeUp.label: voodoo
LanguageData.WakeUp.description: A stimulant preparation brewed from herbs, pre-war compounds, and local ingredients following old traditions. Eliminates the need for sleep and sharpens focus for hours. Prolonged use degrades health and creates dependency.
LanguageData.Yayo.label: fermented brahmin shrooms
LanguageData.Yayo.description: Powdered fermented brahmin shroom preparation, typically snorted for a rapid and intense euphoric effect. Highly addictive and damaging with prolonged use. A potent form of the brahmin shroom product line.
LanguageData.VDE_Dryad_Gaubricmaker.label: hideweaver treeminder
LanguageData.VDE_Dryad_Nectarmaker.label: mapppruul puuhaldur
LanguageData.VDE_Dryad_Spitter.label: sülitaja puunägija
LanguageData.VDE_Dryad_Stonedigger.label: kivikaevaja puukaevaja
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_BishopHat.description: Kõrge tseremoniaalne peakate, mille eesmärk oli tähistada organiseeritud usu või tühermaa kultuse juhti.
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_BishopHat.label: kõrge jutlustaja müts
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_BrimlessHat.description: Väike tavaline müts, mis oli mõeldud õrnalt peas toetumiseks. Need, kes seda pooldavad, väidavad sageli, et see annab neile vana maailma müstiku välimuse.
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_CommisarHat.description: Silmapaistev äärega müts, mida kaunistab auastmemärk, mis on mõeldud innustada alluvaid iga hinna eest kuuletusele.
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_CommisarHat.label: ülevaataja kork
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_Fez.description: Musta tutiga kaunistatud lameda tipuga kooniline müts, mida sageli kannavad kõrbekaupmehed, karavanibossid ja teised vanade teede eliidid.
LanguageData.VIEHAR_Apparel_Rags.description: Kulunud kaltsude komplekt, mis on mõeldud keha katmiseks minimaalse askeldamisega. Need ei paku peaaegu mingit kaitset ega soojust, kuid annavad selgelt märku, et elu on karmilt ja tühermaale pühendunud.
LanguageData.ChoppedStump_Gauranlen.description: Puuisa säilmed, maha raiutud ja kännuna maha jäetud.
LanguageData.ChoppedStump_Gauranlen.label: hakitud Treefather känd
LanguageData.Dryad_Basic.description: Tavaline puuhaldur, imetaja moodi ja lojaalne oma puuisale. See võib vajaduse korral muutuda spetsiaalseteks kastideks.
LanguageData.Dryad_Basic.label: puuhaldur
LanguageData.DryadCocoon.description: Kookon, kus puulind moondub uude kasti, juhindudes Puuisa FEV-ga infundeeritud juurtest.
LanguageData.DryadCocoon.label: treeminder kookon
LanguageData.DryadHealingPod.description: Taastava Treefatheri mahlaga täidetud kaun, mida kasutatakse vigastatud puumäljade ravimiseks.
LanguageData.DryadHealingPod.label: tervendav kaun
LanguageData.GaumakerCocoon.description: Kookon, kus idandid ühinevad, et luua uus Treefather-kaun, mis jätkab sümbiootilist tsüklit.
LanguageData.GaumakerCocoon.label: idanev kookon
LanguageData.GauranlenSeed.description: Puuisa seeme, mis suudab kasvatada uue muteerunud puu ja alustada sümbiootilist tsüklit.
LanguageData.GauranlenSeed.label: Puuisa seeme
LanguageData.Plant_MossGauranlen.description: Samblalaik, mis kasvab Treefatheri ümber, kaunistades piirkonda ja aidates kaasa puumägede tootmisele.
LanguageData.Plant_MossGauranlen.label: Puusammal
LanguageData.Plant_PodGauranlen.description: Treefatheri toodetud kaun, mis sisaldab uute puuhaldurite seemneid.
LanguageData.Plant_PodGauranlen.label: Puuisa kaun
LanguageData.Plant_TreeGauranlen.description: Muteerunud puu, mis on infundeeritud FEV-ga, mis on võimeline tootma puumälereid ja kaunasid. Selle juured ulatuvad sügavale, ühendades selle tühermaa saladustega.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeGauranlen.label: Puuisa
LanguageData.SmashedStump_Gauranlen.description: Puuisa säilmed, purustatud ja kännuna maha jäetud.
LanguageData.SmashedStump_Gauranlen.label: purustas Treefather kännu
LanguageData.Dryad_Barkskin.description: A hardy caste of treeminder, the radbarkling is covered in thick, bark-like hide infused with radiation. It excels at absorbing damage in combat, protecting its tree and allies.
LanguageData.Dryad_Barkskin.label: radbarkling
LanguageData.Dryad_Berrymaker.description: A treeminder caste specialized in food production, the mutfruitling generates nourishing mutfruit on an ongoing basis. It is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
LanguageData.Dryad_Berrymaker.label: mutfruitling
LanguageData.Dryad_Carrier.description: A helpful caste of treeminder, the portling is specialized in carrying items. Under human influence, it hauls goods where they need to go, but is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
LanguageData.Dryad_Carrier.label: portling
LanguageData.Dryad_Clawer.description: A fierce caste of treeminder, the scratchling is bred for aggression and damage-dealing attacks. Its oversized claws can tear through most threats, but it is vulnerable to retaliation.
LanguageData.Dryad_Clawer.label: scratchling
LanguageData.Dryad_Gaumaker.description: A unique caste of treeminder, the sproutling can produce new Gauranlen pods and help reproduce the treefather. Three sproutlings must slowly merge to complete the process.
LanguageData.Dryad_Gaumaker.label: sproutling
LanguageData.Dryad_Medicinemaker.description: A gentle caste of treeminder, the brocflowerling specializes in producing medicinal herbs. It works with its tree to generate healing plants, but is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
LanguageData.Dryad_Medicinemaker.label: brocflowerling
LanguageData.Dryad_Woodmaker.description: A slow, bumbling caste of treeminder, the scrapwoodling specializes in producing scrap wood. Together with its Gauranlen tree, it generates wood-like material on an ongoing basis, but is slow and ineffective at work or combat.
LanguageData.Dryad_Woodmaker.label: scrapwoodling
LanguageData.Dryad_Pungaling.description: Pungade tootmisele spetsialiseerunud aeglane ja kohmakas treeminderi kast. Koos Gauranleni puuga võib see driad pidevalt punga vilju toota. Tööl või võitluses on see aga aeglane ja ebatõhus.\n\nÜldiselt on puunädurid imetajatega sarnased olendid, kellel on puuisaga sümbiootiline suhe. Nad paljunevad koos oma puuga, mis sisaldab FEV proove. Treeminders võivad muutuda mitmesugusteks spetsiaalseteks kastideks.
LanguageData.Dryad_Pungaling.label: pungaling treeminder
LanguageData.ShuttleCrashing.label: vertibird (crashing)
LanguageData.TransportPod.description: Automated cargo bots used to deliver people and supplies across the planet.
LanguageData.TransportPod.label: cargo bot
LanguageData.AnimusStone.description: A resonant cryptic stone studied by Whitespring researchers. It increases cryptid meditation focus and is often used in enclave research facilities.
LanguageData.AnimusStone.label: cryptic stone
LanguageData.ChoppedStump_Anima.description: A stump left behind after an Mothman totem has been felled. The stump can be extracted but yields very little usable wood. Left outdoors, the stump will deteriorate in time.
LanguageData.ChoppedStump_Anima.label: chopped Mothman stump
LanguageData.NatureShrine_Large.description: A large shrine for honoring cryptid forces. Whitespring operatives use these to amplify cryptid focus during ritualized study.
LanguageData.NatureShrine_Large.label: large cryptic shrine
LanguageData.NatureShrine_Small.description: A small shrine used by cryptid researchers to focus meditation and study. These shrines strengthen cryptid-focused meditation for Whitespring operatives.
LanguageData.NatureShrine_Small.label: small cryptic shrine
LanguageData.Plant_GrassAnima.description:
Mysterious black eggs with a red glow. Tribal peoples find that these eggs grow around the base of a Mothman totem as they meditate. It seems to reflect some kind of strengthening of the totem's cryptic power.

Wasteland scientists have tried to study the phenomenon, but the eggs fail to hatch when observed too closely.

Animals refuse eat Mothman eggs. Tribal stories say this is done out of respect and fear.
LanguageData.Plant_GrassAnima.label: Mothman eggs
LanguageData.Plant_TreeAnima.description: A Mothman totem used by Appalachia cultists to focus their meditation and worship.
LanguageData.Plant_TreeAnima.label: Mothman totem
LanguageData.SmashedStump_Anima.description: The remnants of an Mothman totem destroyed by damage. It's ugly. The stump can be extracted but yields very little usable wood. Left outdoors, the stump will deteriorate in time.
LanguageData.SmashedStump_Anima.label: smashed Mothman stump
LanguageData.Chemshine.description: A harsh, flammable wasteland liquor distilled from chemfuel. Rot gut dulls pain and misery for a while, but it leaves the drinker soaked in volatile fumes and can turn a bad death into a fireball.
LanguageData.Chemshine.label: rot gut
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyDistillery.description: Väga õrna viimistletud kullatud piiritusetehas, mis on mõeldud pungashine virde joomiseks laagerdamiseks.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyDistillery.label: pungashine ikka
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMush.description: Viilutatud ja pressitud punga vili, mis on valmis pungashine'i poole küpsema.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMush.label: pungashine puder
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMust.description: Täielikult küpsenud punga likööri põhi, valmis pungašiiniks destilleerimiseks.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMust.label: pungashine peab
LanguageData.VBE_Cigarettes.description: Väike rullikeeratud paberist toru, mis on lõdvalt täidetud koiotitubaka närimisega. See pakub lühiajalist eufooriat, kerget stimulatsiooni ja sama vananenud tühermaa lõhna, mis sunnib suitsetajaid tagasi tulema.
LanguageData.VBE_Cigars.description: Paks sigar rullis koiottitubaka närimisest ja valmis kallima, tahtlikuma suitsu jaoks. See kannab väljamõeldud esitluse all karedat kõrbekibedust.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrink.description: Terav kihisev guaraana pudel, mis on viimistletud kibeduse ja radioaktiivse järelmaitsega. See lööb kõvasti eest ja jätab teisele poole ootama avarii.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrink.label: guaraana
LanguageData.VBE_FineCocktail.description: Peen aatomikokteil, mis on segatud täpselt mitmest koostisosast.
LanguageData.VBE_FineCocktail.label: peen aatomikokteil
LanguageData.VBE_GourmetCocktail.description: Mixoloogia ime, kus iga klaas, garneering ja segamine on häälestatud gurmee-aatomikokteiliks.
LanguageData.VBE_GourmetCocktail.label: gurmee aatomikokteil
LanguageData.VBE_LavishCocktail.description: Rikkalik aatomikokteil, mis on segatud paljudest erinevatest koostisosadest ja jahutatud enne serveerimist täiuslikuks.
LanguageData.VBE_LavishCocktail.label: rikkalik aatomikokteil
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Tobacco.description: Vastupidav koiottitubakas, mis sobib Mojave ja teiste kuiva tühermaa kliimaga. Kui lehed on kuivanud, muutuvad need suitsetamiseks, rullimiseks või kauplemiseks mõeldud koiotitubaka närimiseks.
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Tobacco.label: koiottitubakas
LanguageData.VBE_RawCoffee.description: Sõjaeelse lahustuva kohvi vaakumiga suletud purgid. Mõru, säilivuskindel ja siiski piisavalt tugev, et kinnitada iga Lucky 38 hommikusöögiteenus.
LanguageData.VBE_RawCoffee.label: lahustuv kohv
LanguageData.VBE_RawTea.description: Kuivatatud sõjaeelsed teelehed, mida hoitakse Lucky 38 sahvripurgis. Säilivad hästi ja torkavad ikka korralikult hooldatavasse tassi.
LanguageData.VBE_RawTea.label: kuivatatud teelehed
LanguageData.VBE_RawTobacco.description: Kuivatatud koiotitubaka närimiskott. Piisavalt kuiv, et suitsetada, rullida või rikkalikumaks seguks pakkida, nii, nagu tolmune hammustus tühermaa suitsetajad ootavad.
LanguageData.VBE_RawTobacco.label: koiottitubaka närimine
LanguageData.VBE_SimpleCocktail.description: Lihtne aatomikokteil kiiresti segatud koostisosade duost.
LanguageData.VBE_SimpleCocktail.label: lihtne aatomikokteil
LanguageData.VBE_Soda.description: Magus kihisev pudel kodupruulitud sarsaparillat. See on pigem värskendav kui toitev, kuid jahutatud pudel tundub siiski sõjaeelse luksusena.
LanguageData.VBE_Soda.label: kodupruul sarsaparilla
LanguageData.VBE_SodaFountain.description: Kõik-ühes kodus valmistatud sarsaparilla villimisseade. Siirup segatakse, gaseeritakse, jahutatakse ja jagatakse teenindamiseks steriliseeritud pudelitesse.
LanguageData.VBE_SodaFountain.label: homebrew sarsaparilla purskkaev
LanguageData.VBE_SodaSyrup.description: Paks, intensiivselt magus põhi kodupruulitud sarsaparilla jaoks. See on ette nähtud enne serveerimist lõikamiseks, gaseerimiseks ja villimiseks.
LanguageData.VBE_SodaSyrup.label: kodupruulitud sarsaparillasiirup
LanguageData.CashRegister_CashRegister.description: Registreerimislaud salongiteenuste, söögivahelehtede ja majakontode jaoks. See ei tee üksi midagi, vaid kinnitab maja ees toimimise.
LanguageData.CashRegister_CashRegister.label: registreerimislaud
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineBlue.description: Esmaklassiline Lucky 38 pesapank, mis on loodud suure piiranguga mängimiseks, poleeritud messing ja näljane maja.
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineBlue.label: õnnelikud 38 kõrge rulliga rullid
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineGreen.description: House-ajastu slotipank, mis on häälestatud tavaliste klientide ja usaldusväärse öise liikluse jaoks.
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineGreen.label: õnnelikud 38 standardrulli
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineRed.description: Tagasivõetud Vault 21 mänguautomaat, millel on tagasihoidlik panus ja andestav maja eelis.
LanguageData.HC_SlotMachineRed.label: võlvkelder 21 senti pesa
LanguageData.VBE_EspressoMachineBuilding.description: A polished Lucky 38 Luxobrew coffee pot rebuilt for high-volume service. It handles espresso pulls, reheating chilled coffee, and tea blends from a single compact station.
LanguageData.VBE_EspressoMachineBuilding.label: luxobrew coffee pot
LanguageData.VBE_MintLeaves.description: Bright carrot flowers used to freshen brewed drinks and garnish wasteland dishes.
LanguageData.VBE_MintLeaves.label: carrot flowers
LanguageData.VBE_MintPlant.description: A stand of carrot flowers used for bright herbal garnish in teas and coffee blends.
LanguageData.VBE_MintPlant.label: carrot flower patch
LanguageData.Chocolate.description: Hoolikalt pakitud sõjaeelse šokolaadi vahekaart. Rikkalik, magus ja siiski piisavalt dekadentne magustoitude ja siirupite ankurdamiseks.
LanguageData.Chocolate.label: konserveeritud šokolaad
LanguageData.VCE_DigestibleResurrectorNanites.descrip: Haruldane sõjaeelne meditsiiniline vedrustus, mis on ümber pakitud Lucky 38 köögi jaoks. Toidu sisse voltituna ujutab aqua cura keha üle hädaolukorra parandamise naniitidega, mis võivad sööja surmast tagasi tõmmata.
LanguageData.VCE_DigestibleResurrectorNanites.label: aqua cura
LanguageData.VCE_RawSpices.description: Konserveeritud segu sõjaeelsetest köögivürtsidest, mis on suletud Lucky 38 sahvripurki. Igas purgis säilib piisavalt palju hautiste, kastmete ja grillide heledamaks muutmiseks.
LanguageData.VCE_RawSugar.description: Vanadest köökidest ja sahvritest leitud pitseeritud pakid sõjaeelse suhkruga. See säilib lõputult ja annab endiselt sama kiire magusaisu.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.description: Tihe, joovastav või, mis on klopitud mõnusaks Lucky 38 toiduvalmistamiseks. See levib rikkalikult, lööb kõvasti ja muudab iga eine suurepärase maitsega halvaks ideeks.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.label: brahmin shroom või
LanguageData.VCEV_CookingBook.description:
Löönud kokaraamat, mis on täis taastatud retsepte, koostisainete märkmeid ja sõjaeelseid kööginippe.
Pärast lugemist annab see lugejale uue lemmikkomponendi või -toidu, seejärel laguneb see köögis liiga paljude käte käest.
LanguageData.VCEV_CookingBook.label: tühermaa kokaraamat
LanguageData.Gastronomy_Waiting.description: Võtab vastu tellimusi ja serveerib toite teie puhkeruumides ja söögitubades.
LanguageData.CashRegister_Mech.description: Automaatne teenindusterminal mehhaaniliste saatjate jaoks. Siit saate juhtida söögituba ja maja ees toiminguid.
LanguageData.CashRegister_Mech.label: autonoomne teenindusterminal
LanguageData.SmallHotSpring.description: Aurugeisri kohale ehitatud hoolikalt töödeldud kuumaveeallikas. Selle mineraalveed pakuvad meditatiivset lõõgastust, tagasihoidlikke taastumishüvesid ja esmaklassilist vannimugavust kuni neljale etturile korraga.
LanguageData.SmallHotSpring.label: kuurort kuumaveeallikas
LanguageData.Apparel_ArchoShuttle.description: Kummaline arhhotehniline signaalrakett, mis kutsub eikusagilt peapöörise. Ükskõik, mis intelligentsus vastab, on ta valmis andma ühe imelise väljavõtte.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArchoShuttle.label: vertibird signaalrakett
LanguageData.Apparel_ArchoShuttle.verbs.0.label: pop signaali sähvatus
LanguageData.Apparel_ShuttleComm.description: Ühekordselt kasutatav välitransponder, mida kasutatakse Brotherhoodi vertibirdi ülesvõtmiseks.
LanguageData.Apparel_ShuttleComm.label: Vennaskonna välitransponder
LanguageData.Apparel_ShuttleComm.verbs.0.label: helista vertibird pickup
LanguageData.Spaceports_Beacon.description: Pikamaa IFF-majakas ja liiklusjuhtimismast, mida kasutavad Vennaskonna rakud ja usaldusväärsed liitlased, et reklaamida ohutut pöördelist lähenemist, koordineerida maandumist ja tankimisvõimalusi.
LanguageData.Spaceports_Beacon.label: Vennaskonna lennumajakas
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelDispenser.description: Teenindusterminal, mis müüb lennukikütust Vennaskonna vertilindudele ja teistele volitatud lennukitele. See tuleb asetada vertibirdi padja kõrvale; pärast makse kontrollimist tõmbavad padja sees olevad pumbad kütust sama elektrivõrgu paakidest.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelDispenser.label: vertibirdi tankimisterminal
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelProcessor.description: Tööstuslik protsessor, mis töötleb lenduvat lähteainet ja vett Vennaskonna vertilindude lennukikütuseks. See töötab kõige paremini vee juurdepääsuga ja muudab keemiakütuse ülejäägi müüdavaks lennuvaruks.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelProcessor.label: lennukikütuse töötleja
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelTank.description: Jahutuspaak töödeldud lennukikütuse jaoks. Jätke see toiteallikaks, muidu hakkab vedelik ära aurustuma.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelTank.label: lennuki kütusepaak
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleLandingPad.description: Karastatud maandumisplats koos juhttulede, tankimisühenduste ja krüpteeritud transponderiga vennaskonna vertilindude jaoks. Hoidke see jõuliselt ja selgena ning külastavad patrullid, komandörid, kauplejad ja nendega seotud reisijad saavad siia alla tulla.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleLandingPad.label: Brotherhood vertibird pad
LanguageData.Spaceports_VisitorSpot.description: Määrab konfigureeritava punkti, kuhu pärast maandumist kogunevad külastavad Vennaskonna töötajad, kauplejad ja nendega seotud reisijad. Kui kehtivat punkti ei leita, jäävad nad oma vertibirdi lähedusse.
LanguageData.Spaceports_VisitorSpot.label: vertilindude kogunemiskoht
LanguageData.VCE_Chirashizushi.label: mirelurki kauss (lihtne)
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedSushi.label: friteeritud varitsemine
LanguageData.VCE_Futomaki.label: futolurk (üllas)
LanguageData.VCE_Gunkanmaki.label: gunkanlurk (gurmaan)
LanguageData.VCE_Nigiri.label: murkiri (hea)
LanguageData.VCE_Norimaki.label: norilurk (lihtne)
LanguageData.VCE_Oshizushi.label: oshilurk (gurmaan)
LanguageData.VCE_RawSoybean.description: Hapukas tühermaa jõhvikad. Neid võib süüa toorelt, keedetuna hoidisteks või kääritada paksuks lauakastmeks.
LanguageData.VCE_RawSoybean.label: jõhvikad
LanguageData.VCE_RawWasabi.label: ksandri juur
LanguageData.VCE_Soybean.description: Tugev jõhvikapõõsas, mida kasvatatakse teravate punaste marjade saamiseks. Puuviljad valmivad rikkalikuks kastmeks, mis tähistab vanaaegset kääritatud maitseaineahelat.
LanguageData.VCE_Soybean.label: jõhvikapõõsas
LanguageData.VCE_SoyFermenter.label: jõhvikakaste vat
LanguageData.VCE_SoySauce.description: Rikkalik jõhvikamarjandus, mida kasutatakse sushi ja tühermaa mereandide dipikastme, glasuuri ja soolase-magusa viimistluskastmena.
LanguageData.VCE_SoySauce.label: jõhvikakaste
LanguageData.VCE_Temaki.label: temlurk (üllas)
LanguageData.VCE_Uramaki.label: uralurk (hea)
LanguageData.VCE_Wasabi.description: Ksandri juurelaik, mida hinnatakse terava hambumusega. Pastaks jahvatades on see mereandide ja riisiroogade jaoks tugev maitseaine.
LanguageData.VCE_Wasabi.label: ksanderi juureplaaster
LanguageData.VCE_WasabiPaste.description: Terav pasta, mis on valmistatud jahvatatud ksandrijuurest ja mida kasutatakse terava maitseainena sushi ja muude mereanniroogade jaoks.
LanguageData.VCE_WasabiPaste.label: xander juure pasta
LanguageData.Therapist.description: Aidake kolonistidel ja patroonidel stressi, trauma ja sõltuvusega toime tulla privaatses nõustamiskomplektis.
LanguageData.MedievalVendingMachine.description: Madaltehnoloogiline kiosk klientidele, mis ei vaja elektrit.
LanguageData.MedievalVendingMachine.label: teeninduskioski
LanguageData.VendingMachine.description: Sõjaeelne kiosk, mis on varustatud külastajatele, kasiinoliiklusele ja passiivsetele puhketubadele.
LanguageData.AtmosphericHeater.description: A Poseidon home reactor powered by scavenged dark archotechnology. It burns bioferrite to agitate atmospheric gases, raising the outdoor temperature while flooding the area with waste heat.
LanguageData.AtmosphericHeater.label: Poseidon home reactor
LanguageData.BioferriteGenerator.description: An experimental generator that works by pressurizing and igniting bioferrite, then harvesting energy from the resulting heat. The fuel remains bioferrite, but the chassis and control layout read like a harsh Poseidon prototype.
LanguageData.BioferriteShaper.description: A specialized shaping bench that uses heat and electromagnetic stimulation to temporarily coax bioferrite into a pliable state. The material remains bioferrite, but the surrounding hardware fits cleanly into a Fallout-style industrial workshop.
LanguageData.SerumCentrifuge.description: A Med-Tek serum lab that uses scavenged archotechnology to create single-use injectable serums. Clean, expensive, and morally questionable in exactly the right pre-War way.
LanguageData.SerumCentrifuge.label: Med-Tek serum lab
LanguageData.RB_FloorLamp.description: A floor-mounted Wattz lamp that lights an area using electricity. It is less powerful than a standing lamp, but it looks right at home in a retro-futurist sitting room.
LanguageData.Chemfuel.description: A refined liquid fuel suitable for generators, burners, and industrial feed systems. In a saner age Poseidon would have sold it through a smiling subsidiary with a patriotic slogan.
LanguageData.Chemfuel.label: oil
LanguageData.PS_ChemfuelTank.description: An industrial storage tank meant for oil delivered through the pipe network. Tanks can be siphoned for usable fuel as needed, but even light damage can turn leaking vapors into a violent fireball.
LanguageData.PS_ChemfuelTank.label: oil tank
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelDrain.description: A basin meant to feed stored oil into the network and fill connected tanks.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelDrain.label: oil drain
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelPipe.description: Steel pipes designed to move usable oil from deepchem refineries to oil tanks for storage or to oil-fed structures for automatic refilling.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelPipe.label: oil pipe
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelTap.description: A basin meant to hold dispensed oil from storage tanks for later use.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelTap.label: oil tap
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelValve.description: Switches oil flow on or off.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelValve.label: oil valve
LanguageData.VCHE_UndergroundChemfuelPipe.description: Buried steel pipes designed to move usable oil from deepchem refineries to oil tanks for storage or to oil-fed structures for automatic refilling.
LanguageData.VCHE_UndergroundChemfuelPipe.label: subterranean oil pipe
LanguageData.Battery.description: A Poseidon reserve battery for holding excess electricity. Charged units remain dangerous when exposed to rain or fire, regardless of what the brochure claims.
LanguageData.BiofuelRefinery.description: A Poseidon refinery that converts biological matter into oil for generators, burners, and industrial storage systems.
LanguageData.BiofuelRefinery.label: oil refinery
LanguageData.ChemfuelPoweredGenerator.description: Produces power by consuming oil. It must be periodically refueled by hand unless your settlement has the industrial habits of an actual Poseidon facility.
LanguageData.ChemfuelPoweredGenerator.label: oil generator
LanguageData.CommsConsole.description: A Wattz communications console for contacting other factions and orbital traders. Big, expensive, and full of humming pre-War electronics.
LanguageData.Cooler.description: An Appalachia Freeze cooling unit that pushes cold air to one side and hot exhaust to the other. It can preserve food or simply make summer tolerable if the rest of the grid holds.
LanguageData.DeepDrill.description: A Corvega deep-crust drilling rig for extracting minerals from far below the surface. Use a ground-penetrating scanner to detect the best seams.
LanguageData.DrugLab.description: A powered industrial chem lab with containers, heaters, and measurement devices for efficient batch processing of drugs and compounds.
LanguageData.ElectricCrematorium.description: A heavy industrial crematorium that vaporizes corpses at extreme temperatures. It is efficient, impersonal, and unmistakably pre-War in temperament.
LanguageData.ElectricSmelter.description: A Corvega reclamation smelter that extracts usable metal from slag and mixed scrap. It consumes a lot of power and throws off serious industrial heat.
LanguageData.ElectricSmelter.label: Corvega reclamation smelter
LanguageData.FabricationBench.description: A Corvega fabrication bench equipped with advanced tools for producing sophisticated machines and components from simpler materials.
LanguageData.FirefoamPopper.description: A Wattz safety device that sprays fire-retardant foam when it detects a blaze. Exactly the kind of sensible utility hardware that survives long after the corporation that sold it is gone.
LanguageData.FlatscreenTelevision.description: A Radiation King flatscreen television with crystal-clear image and rich color. Trust the king for all your TV and radio needs.
LanguageData.GeothermalGenerator.description: A Poseidon geothermal plant that taps deep heat for steady, high-output power. It is exactly the kind of hulking civic infrastructure Poseidon loved to dominate a skyline with.
LanguageData.GeothermalGenerator.label: geothermal plant
LanguageData.Heater.description: A Wattz Electronics heating unit that converts electricity into controlled room heat. It automatically cycles to reach a target temperature.
LanguageData.HiTechResearchBench.description: A Wattz high-tech research bench with computers and electronic measurement equipment. It enables rapid research and more advanced technical projects.
LanguageData.HospitalBed.description: A Med-Tek hospital bed specially designed for clinical care. Adjustable support geometry and integrated instruments improve patient outcomes over ordinary beds.
LanguageData.MegascreenTelevision.description: A huge Radiation King television for settlements that want their entertainment loud, bright, and impossible to ignore.
LanguageData.NutrientPasteDispenser.description: An industrial dispenser that synthesizes edible nutrient paste from feedstocks placed in adjacent hoppers. Efficient, joyless, and exactly the sort of machine a large contractor would call progress.
LanguageData.OrbitalTradeBeacon.description: A Wattz orbital trade beacon used to mark goods for exchange with orbital merchants. Dependable, compact, and built for practical frontier commerce.
LanguageData.PowerConduit.description: A bundle of utility cables for moving power around a settlement. It can be placed under walls and other structures as part of a proper pre-War grid.
LanguageData.SolarGenerator.description: A Poseidon Civilian Helios Two solar panel array for settlement-scale power generation. It delivers its best output under full daylight and clear skies.
LanguageData.SolarGenerator.label: civilian Helios Two
LanguageData.TubeTelevision.description: A Radiation King tube television built around bulky old display hardware and a distinctly pre-War sense of domestic prestige.
LanguageData.VanometricPowerCell.description: A compact power cell that generates free energy forever without conventional fuel. Even by pre-War standards it feels less like engineering and more like a secret Poseidon program nobody was meant to understand.
LanguageData.VitalsMonitor.description: A Med-Tek patient telemetry unit that improves tend quality, surgery success, and recovery when mounted directly beside a hospital bed.
LanguageData.WatermillGenerator.description: A Poseidon hydro unit designed to draw steady power from moving water. Crowded placements create turbulence and reduce output.
LanguageData.WatermillGenerator.label: hydro turbine
LanguageData.WindTurbine.description: A utility-grade wind turbine for civilian settlements. It needs a broad, clear approach to keep airflow stable.
LanguageData.WindTurbine.label: civilian wind turbine
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Autofarmer.description: A large Corvega automated field machine that combines sowing and harvesting across a designated outdoor zone. It deposits harvested goods into attached factory hoppers or drops them on the ground if hoppers are not present, and can be set to cycle automatically once most plants in the zone are fully grown.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Autofarmer.label: agri-industrial harvester
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutomatedBiofuelRefinery.desc:
A Corvega automated refinery that converts biological matter such as wood and plant stock into chemfuel.
Factory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutomatedDrillPlatform.descri: An automated Corvega deep extraction rig for pulling stone and buried metals up from the crust. Works machinery needs hoppers for intake and output, throws off serious heat, and can be overclocked at the cost of even greater draw and temperature.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutomatedDrillPlatform.label: Corvega drill platform
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutomatedMasonrySaw.descripti:
An industrial Corvega masonry saw capable of cutting stone chunks into usable blocks.
Factory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutomatedMasonrySaw.label: automated masonry line
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutomatedSmelter.description:
A Corvega automated smelter that extracts usable metal from slag chunks, broken-down weapons, apparel, stone chunks, and mechanoid corpses using strong electromagnets and industrial heat.
Factory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Conveyor.description: A basic industrial conveyor for moving materials between work cells with minimal labor handling.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Conveyor.label: industrial conveyor
LanguageData.VFEFactory_FactoryHopper.description: Stores feedstock and finished goods for automated Corvega works machinery.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_FactoryHopper.label: works hopper
LanguageData.VFEFactory_UndergroundConveyorEntrance.d: A buried intake point that lets an industrial conveyor run beneath short stretches of ground before resurfacing.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_UndergroundConveyorExit.descr: A buried discharge point that brings an underground conveyor back to the surface near the next work cell.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_UndergroundConveyorExit.label: buried conveyor discharge
LanguageData.VHGE_GasFloodlight.description: A tall propane floodlight that illuminates a massive area. It is not bright enough for crop growth, but it provides dependable yard lighting when connected to the propane network.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasFloodlight.label: propane floodlight
LanguageData.VHGE_GasLamp.description: A propane-fed standing lamp for utility lighting. It must be connected to the propane network and can be placed safely outdoors.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasLamp.label: propane lamp
LanguageData.VHGE_GasSunLamp.description: An industrial lamp bright enough for crop growth, but it burns a steady supply of propane. It shuts itself off at night.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasSunLamp.label: propane sun lamp
LanguageData.VHGE_GasWallLamp.description: A propane-fed wall light for utility corridors and work rooms. It must be connected to the propane network and can be placed safely outdoors.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasWallLamp.label: propane wall lamp
LanguageData.VHGE_Helixien.label: propane
LanguageData.Facility_IVDrip.description: A Med-Tek intravenous drip stand for rapidly delivering lost fluids to a patient, helping immunity gain and blood loss recovery when placed directly adjacent to a hospital bed or surgical table. Only works for hospital beds or surgical tables; normal beds will not benefit. Attaching more than one stand to the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.Facility_IVDrip.label: Med-Tek IV stand
LanguageData.Facility_VitalsCentre.description: A large Med-Tek centre for monitoring the vitals of several patients at once, improving tend quality, surgery success, and immunity gain when linked to hospital beds or surgical suites.
LanguageData.Facility_VitalsCentre.label: Med-Tek vitals centre
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPasteDripper.description: A bedside Mama Dolce feeding device that delivers nutrient paste directly to bedridden patients when linked to a nutrient vat. Practical, clinical, and just unsettling enough to feel authentic.
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPasteFeeder.description: A compact Corvega feeder that outputs nutrient paste from the pipe network for routine worker consumption.
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPasteGrinder.description: A Mama Dolce nutrient grinder that reduces organic feedstocks into pipeline-ready paste stock. Efficient, impersonal, and very much in the spirit of industrial pre-War food engineering.
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPasteTap.description: A Mama Dolce paste tap that dispenses prepared nutrient meals from the vat network. It is the kind of practical cafeteria hardware a large contractor would install by the hundred.
LanguageData.VNPE_NutrientPasteVat.description: A Corvega storage vat for holding large volumes of processed nutrient paste. Destroying one makes exactly the kind of industrial mess you would expect.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedBattery.description: A sealed Poseidon battery unit with far better efficiency than common storage cells. These pre-War housings are rainproof and less prone to catastrophic discharge.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedSolarGenerator.description: A high-efficiency Poseidon solar array marketed as the Industrial Helios Two, built to pull significantly more charge from direct sunlight than ordinary civilian panels.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedSolarGenerator.label: industrial Helios Two
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWatermillGenerator.descripti: A Poseidon hydro unit designed to draw industrial power from moving water. Crowded installations create turbulence and reduce output.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWatermillGenerator.label: industrial hydro turbine
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWindTurbine.description: A pre-War Poseidon utility turbine built for industrial output. It needs broad clear approaches to keep airflow stable and advertises the sort of oversized confidence Poseidon loved to stamp on its public works.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedWindTurbine.label: industrial wind turbine
LanguageData.VFE_LargeAdvancedBattery.description: A large sealed Poseidon battery bank built for dependable utility storage. Unlike older packs, these housings withstand rain without exploding.
LanguageData.VFE_LargeBattery.description: A large Poseidon battery bank meant to hold reserve power for later demand. Fully charged units are dangerous when exposed to rain or fire.
LanguageData.VFE_SmallBattery.description: A compact reserve battery for local circuits and small industrial loads. Charged units can still blow when exposed to rain or fire.
LanguageData.VFE_ComponentFabricationBench.descriptio: A powered Corvega assembly bench fitted for turning raw stock into industrial and spacer-grade components.
LanguageData.VFE_ComponentFabricationBench.label: Corvega assembly bench
LanguageData.VFE_FueledSmelter.description: A fuel-fed foundry station for recovering usable metal from slag and scrap items.
LanguageData.VFE_FueledSmelter.label: fueled foundry
LanguageData.VFE_TableButcherElectric.description: A motorized butcher line with a rotary saw for fast, precise carcass breakdown. It consumes a heavy amount of power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableButcherElectric.label: industrial butcher line
LanguageData.VFE_TableDrugLabElectric.description: A powered Corvega chem lab with heaters, vessels, and gauges for efficient batch processing of compounds and drugs.
LanguageData.VFE_TableDrugLabElectric.label: industrial chem lab
LanguageData.VFE_TableMachiningLarge.description: A large Corvega machining platform with advanced tooling and floor space for rapid fabrication of technical equipment. It consumes power.
LanguageData.VFE_TableMachiningLarge.label: Corvega machining platform
LanguageData.VFE_TableSmithyLarge.description: A powered Corvega forge station for weapons, tools, and heavy benchwork. It draws a substantial load from the grid.
LanguageData.VFE_TableSmithyLarge.label: Corvega forge station
LanguageData.VFE_TableStonecutterElectric.description: An industrial masonry saw with powered cutters for turning chunks into building blocks at assembly-line speed.
LanguageData.VFE_TableStonecutterElectric.label: industrial masonry saw
LanguageData.VFE_TableStoveLarge.description: A large industrial cooking line with multiple ovens and burners for rapid meal production under heavy settlement demand.
LanguageData.VFE_TableStoveLarge.label: industrial galley range
LanguageData.VFE_TableTailorLarge.description: A large industrial tailoring bench with powered sewing equipment for rapid clothing output. It can still limp along without power at reduced speed.
LanguageData.VFE_TableTailorLarge.label: industrial tailoring bench
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_LargePollutionPump.descripti: A large Poseidon groundwater reclamation pump that gradually strips pollution from broad terrain and condenses the recovered waste into haulable toxic packs.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_LargePollutionPump.label: Poseidon reclamation pump
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_PollutionFastPump.descriptio: A compact high-draw reclamation pump that clears polluted terrain quickly by burning a heavy amount of grid power and packing the recovered contaminants into toxic wastepacks.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_PollutionFastPump.label: high-draw reclamation pump
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_WasteCrate.description: A sealed industrial locker for holding toxic waste products and reclaimed hazardous packs without letting them leak into the local environment.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_WasteCrate.label: sealed waste locker
LanguageData.UnstablePowerCell.description: An unstable fusion battery built around a permanently active power core. It will run forever until something damages the housing badly enough to turn the whole unit into a catastrophic detonation.
LanguageData.UnstablePowerCell.label: unstable fusion battery
LanguageData.VFES_LargeRepulsor.description: A large ultratech shield projector with the unmistakable feel of a Poseidon black-budget installation. It consumes enormous power while active and can set the surrounding area ablaze if it absorbs too much punishment too quickly.
LanguageData.VFES_SmallRepulsor.description: A compact ultratech shield projector that reads like one of Poseidon's more secretive defense contracts. It throws up a potent energy field when a threat is present and idles at far lower draw the rest of the time.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AntiAir.description: A specialized Corvega anti-air turret that intercepts explosive projectiles and incoming drop pods within its defensive radius. It cannot engage ground targets, but it looks every bit like a pre-War perimeter solution.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ArmoredTurret.description: An armored portable turret with Corvega targeting electronics and reinforced plating. Extra armor helps it survive incoming fire, but the control package remains just dumb enough to be dangerous around friendlies.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_AutocannonDouble.description: A twin-barreled autocannon turret with Corvega fire-control electronics. It trades finesse for volume of fire and remains a power-hungry, violently practical defensive platform.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Flame.description: A portable flamer turret with Corvega control electronics and a brutally simple fuel system. It can engulf enemies and terrain in fire, and it remains as unsafe as any honest pre-War weapon platform should be.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_MilitaryTurret.description: A refined automated turret with Corvega targeting hardware, military-grade stabilization, and hardened casing. Its dumb AI brain still cannot be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Minigun.description: A heavy automatic turret whose multi-barrel mechanism unleashes sustained fire at high speed. Corvega control systems keep it cycling, but they do not make it subtle.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_Searchlight.description: A Corvega searchlight combining an intensely bright lamp with a mirrored reflector, useful for illuminating and dazzling targets across a defensive perimeter.
LanguageData.VFES_Turret_ShotgunTurret.description: A compact automatic turret fitted with a semi-automatic shotgun and Corvega targeting electronics. Short-ranged, nasty, and still not smart enough to trust completely.
LanguageData.Spacer_OutdoorLamp.description: An outdoor utility lamp with an integrated Poseidon solar collector. It charges by day and provides dependable lighting after dark.
LanguageData.VFES_AirPurifier.description: A compact Wattz Electronics air scrubber that filters smoke, dust, and hazardous particulates while improving room cleanliness and indoor air quality.
LanguageData.VFES_AirPurifier.label: wattz air scrubber
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialCooler.description: A large Appalachia Freeze wall cooler for serious refrigeration and industrial climate control. Cold air exits one side while hot exhaust is dumped out the other.
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialHeater.description: A large Wattz industrial heater that fits into a wall and pushes serious utility heat. It can automatically cycle to a target temperature.
LanguageData.VTE_LargeCeilingFan.description: A large Wattz ceiling fan for workshops, warehouses, and other rooms that need stronger air circulation.
LanguageData.VTE_SmallCeilingFan.description: A Wattz ceiling fan for slow, steady air circulation in smaller rooms.
LanguageData.VTE_StandingCooler.description: A freestanding Appalachia Freeze cooling unit for open rooms that need relief from summer heat without full freezer performance.
LanguageData.VTE_WallHeater.description: A Wattz wall heater that fits into a wall and keeps rooms warm without wasting floor space.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedCooler.description: An Appalachia Freeze wall-mounted cooler for compact freezer rooms and tight utility spaces.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedHeater.description: A compact Wattz wall-mounted heater for utility corridors, workshops, and smaller rooms that still need dependable automatic temperature control.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedVent.description: A simple Wattz wall vent for equalizing temperatures between adjacent rooms without opening a passageway.
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.description: A small crate containing heavy uranium shells. Used by gauss artillery to reload. A crate is fed directly into adjacent Hellion artillery when it needs to be rearmed.
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.description: An auxiliary interface that allows a copilot to assist in launching and piloting a Hellion. It draws power directly from the Hellion reactor.
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.description: A compact electromagnetic cannon that launches dense uranium slugs at extreme velocities. Designed for local bombardment and medium-range interception, it can also target hostile orbital craft. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the Hellion reactor.
LanguageData.VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.description: A massive reactor assembly that channels a salvaged reactor core into immense electrical output. Its reinforced coils can handle extreme load, making it one of the most potent power sources available for Hellion systems. Adjacent reactor-core power cells multiply the output by 15% each.
LanguageData.VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.label: reactor-core power coil
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.description:
A heavy reactor package built for the largest Hellion frames and orbital support hulls. It sustains an enormous lift field, allowing massive aircraft to rise under their own power while operating near a planetary gravity well.
When launched, anything on Hellion deck plating connected to the reactor will be transported to a new map.
These oversized assemblies were intended for pre-War logistics craft and mobile aerospace platforms, and they demand immense fabrication capacity to keep operational.
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.label: heavy Hellion reactor
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.description:
A compact reactor package adapted for a light Hellion. It generates the lift field needed for rapid vertical launch and short-range atmospheric insertion, but it is not suited to true interplanetary travel.
When launched, anything on Hellion deck plating connected to the reactor will be transported to a new map.
Often salvaged from scout craft, courier platforms, and other pre-War aerospace projects, these reactors are valued for their agility and relatively modest support requirements.
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.label: light Hellion reactor
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipCapacitor.description: Stores large amounts of electricity for later use. Constructed in Hellion deck plating, Hellion capacitors do not obstruct movement.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipCapacitor.label: Hellion capacitor
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_PointDefense.description: A rapid-fire gun for point-defense use aboard the Hellion.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a heavy Hellion. It draws power directly from the heavy Hellion reactor.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a light Hellion. It draws power directly from the Hellion reactor.
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.description: A specialized defensive turret built exclusively for the Hellion. It intercepts explosive projectiles and incoming drop pods within its protective radius, but cannot engage ground targets. Interception chance scales with the target's velocity.
LanguageData.VGE_SolarPanelling.description: Produces electricity from sunlight. Does not work in darkness or under artificial light. It does not obstruct movement or provide cover, but it can only be constructed on Hellion deck plating.
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.description: A control station dedicated to operating a single Hellion artillery piece. Requires a crew member to manually aim and fire the weapon. It draws power directly from the Hellion reactor.
LanguageData.AncientGravReactor.description:
An ancient generator powered by a reactor core. Once capable of producing massive amounts of power, it has now fallen into disrepair. The containment shield is leaking, causing toxic fallout to blanket the whole region.
Hack or destroy the reactor to obtain the core. Be warned, it may explode if damaged.
LanguageData.AncientGravReactor.label: ancient reactor
LanguageData.FuelOptimizer.description:
A control unit that synchronizes the Hellion reactor with its VTOL thrust systems. It reduces the fuel needed for Hellion flight.
One Hellion can support two fuel regulators.
LanguageData.FuelOptimizer.label: fuel regulator
LanguageData.GravAnchor.description:
Prevents the local map from being destroyed during a Hellion launch.
Mooring masts stabilize the launch zone around the aircraft and keep the surrounding settlement intact during departure. They cannot be constructed on the Hellion itself, because doing so would prevent takeoff entirely.
LanguageData.GravAnchor.label: mooring mast
LanguageData.Gravcore.description: A compact pre-War reactor core recovered from prototype Hellion systems and related military hardware. It is useless by itself, but it can be integrated into advanced Hellion support equipment.
LanguageData.Gravcore.label: reactor core
LanguageData.GravcorePowerCell.description: A compact generator built around a salvaged reactor core, adapted to provide steady power for the Hellion's onboard systems.
LanguageData.GravcorePowerCell.label: reactor-core power cell
LanguageData.GravEngine.description:
The pre-War reactor assembly at the heart of the Hellion. It sustains the aircraft's vertical lift envelope and powers the heavy systems needed for long-range atmospheric and orbital operations.
When launched, anything on deck plating connected to the reactor will be transported to a new map. Without a mooring mast, launching the Hellion will abandon your current map.
The Hellion was designed as an unfinished military prototype, requiring rare components, specialist fabrication, and a great deal of salvage to keep flying.
LanguageData.GravEngine.label: Hellion reactor
LanguageData.GravFieldExtender.description:
A support assembly used to expand the Hellion's airframe. It increases the amount of deck plating the craft can carry and must be built near the Hellion reactor.
One Hellion can support up to six airframe extenders.
LanguageData.GravFieldExtender.label: airframe extender
LanguageData.GravlitePanel.description:
A lightweight pre-War airframe panel used to assemble and reinforce Hellion components. It is durable, heat-resistant, and ideal for advanced aerospace construction.
Requires vacstone blocks, which can be obtained from orbital asteroids.
LanguageData.GravlitePanel.label: airframe panel
LanguageData.GravshipHull.description: An airtight armored hull section sized for the Hellion's frame. It seals the craft against vacuum exposure and locks directly into the underlying deck plating, so it can only be built as part of the Hellion.
LanguageData.GravshipHull.label: Hellion hull
LanguageData.GravshipShieldGenerator.description:
A defensive projector that protects the Hellion by generating a short-lived repulsor screen against incoming rounds and mortar fire. Those inside the field can still shoot out.
It must be charged before use. One Hellion can support two shield projectors.
LanguageData.GravshipShieldGenerator.label: Hellion shield projector
LanguageData.LargeThruster.description:
An advanced VTOL thruster with a heat-resistant vacstone liner. It greatly increases the Hellion's operational range. Thrusters require an unobstructed exhaust area free of large buildings and Hellion deck plating.
Requires vacstone blocks, which can be obtained from orbital asteroids.
One Hellion can support up to six heavy VTOL thrusters.
LanguageData.LargeThruster.label: heavy VTOL thruster
LanguageData.PilotConsole.description: A hardened flight console used to launch and pilot the Hellion. It draws power directly from the Hellion reactor.
LanguageData.PilotConsole.label: cockpit console
LanguageData.PilotSubpersonaCore.description:
A low-grade navigation core tuned for Hellion flight. It reduces the chance of an accident when flying the Hellion, though it cannot fully compensate for pilot error.
One Hellion can support up to two navigation cores.
LanguageData.PilotSubpersonaCore.label: navigation core
LanguageData.ShipChunk_Mech.description:
A chunk of robot craft made of steel and salvaged airframe panels. It looks like it was torn free during re-entry or blasted off by heavy weapons.
Deconstruct it to obtain valuable resources.
LanguageData.SignalJammer.description: An electronic countermeasures suite that masks the Hellion's signature and helps it approach heavily defended landing sites.
LanguageData.SignalJammer.label: ECM suite
LanguageData.SmallThruster.description:
A compact VTOL thruster that increases the Hellion's operational range. Thrusters require an unobstructed exhaust area free of large buildings and Hellion deck plating.
One Hellion can support up to four small VTOL thrusters.
LanguageData.SmallThruster.label: small VTOL thruster
LanguageData.RobCo_Assaultron.description: Kahe jalaga lahingurobot, mille on valmistanud RobCo Industries Ameerika Ühendriikide sõjaväe jaoks. Sellel on oliivipunane värviskeem, millel on sõjalised märgistused, kaks küüniskätt lähivõitluseks ja pea külge kinnitatud laser, mis suudab tulistada laetud kiirt. Kiire ja agressiivne Assaultron oli mõeldud eesliini ründerollide jaoks. Mõned üksused olid varustatud varjatud välja generaatoriga, mis võimaldas neil varjata keskmist lähenemist.
LanguageData.RobCo_Assaultron.label: Assaultron
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronDominator.description: Spetsiaalne Assaultroni kütt-tapja variant, mis on ehitatud integreeritud vargvälja kiirsaatja ja spetsiaalse lähiründetera paketi ümber. See loobub tavalisest pealaserist vastutasuks kiiremate varjatud lähenemiste ja ohtlikumate lähivõitluste eest.
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronDominator.label: Assaultron Dominator
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronSheepsquatch.description: Tugevalt modifitseeritud Assaultroni šassii, mis on ehitatud nii, et see meenutaks legendaarset Apalatšide folkloori Sheepsquatchi krüptiidi. Tavalisest Assaultronist suurem ja tõstetud peaga laseriga konstrueeriti see tõenäoliselt hirmutusvahendiks igaühe poolt, kellel oli juurdepääs robootikatöölauale ja tumeda huumorimeelega.
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronSheepsquatch.label: lambatõug
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronBlade.description: Integreeritud Assaultroni mustriga küünarvarre tera, mis on optimeeritud kiirete löögi- ja läbitorkamiste jaoks lähedalt.
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronBlade.label: Assaultroni tera
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronBlade.tools.0.label: Assaultroni tera
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronHeadLaser.description: Kompaktne Assaultroni mustriga pealaser, millel on kiirem tulistamistsükkel kui raskema valgusvihuga projektorid. See muudab selle sobivamaks kiireks lahinguks ja lähivõitluseks.
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronHeadLaser.label: RobCo Assaultroni pealaser
LanguageData.RobCo_SheepsquatchHeadLaser.description: Suure võimsusega pea külge kinnitatav valgusprojektor, mis on ehitatud pika laadimistsükli ja suure plahvatusraadiusega. Väljaheide tekitab märkimisväärset soojust ja on kõige tõhusam, kui seda vallandatakse.
LanguageData.RobCo_SheepsquatchHeadLaser.label: RobCo lambatõmbamispea laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Cyberdog.description: Sõjaväeline robotkoer, mille on välja töötanud RobCo Industries Ameerika Ühendriikide armee jaoks. See ühendab säilinud koeraaju mehaanilise kehaga, andes sellele koerainstinktid ja helilise haukumise relva kaugvõitluseks. Küberkoeri kasutati skautide, valveloomade ja lahingukaaslastena koos sõjaväelastega.
LanguageData.RobCo_Cyberdog.label: küberkoer
LanguageData.RobCo_CyberdogSonicBark.description: Lühimaa akustiline projektor, mida kasutavad RobCo turvaüksused. See kiirgab põrutavat heliimpulssi, mis häirib mehaanilisi sihtmärke ilma otsesele füüsilisele kahjustusele tuginemata.
LanguageData.RobCo_CyberdogSonicBark.label: helikoore kiirgaja
LanguageData.RobCo_Eyebot.description: Väike hõljuv seire- ja edastusdroon, mida toodab RobCo Industries. See kasutab raadiosignaalide ja eelsalvestatud saadete edastamiseks piitsaantenne ja integreeritud kõlareid ning on varustatud täiustatud näotuvastussüsteemidega. Eyebot kannab enesekaitseks kerget laserrelva. Enklaav kasutab seda propagandaks ja luureks laialdaselt, see on kiire ja tabamatu, kuid otseses võitluses äärmiselt habras.
LanguageData.RobCo_Eyebot.label: Eyebot
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotCrashed.description: Vertiboti – sõjaeelse VTOL-i drooni – jäänused lasti alla ja ei olnud enam lennuvõimelised. Hoolimata seisukorrast jäävad parda relvasüsteemid ja automatiseeritud kaitseprotokollid osaliselt aktiivseks. See haarab kõik, mis selle perimeetrisse siseneb.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotCrashed.label: kukkus kokku vertibot robot
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotDuraframe.description: Eksperimentaalsele Duraframe šassiile ehitatud täiustatud Eyebot. Sellel on tugevdatud sisemised komponendid, mis tagavad suurema vastupidavuse kui tavalisel seadmel, ja see kannab võimsamat energiarelva. Kõige enam dokumenteeritud Duraframe'i üksus, tähisega ED-E, oli varustatud Tesla kahuriga ja kandis tundlikke Enclave'i uurimisandmeid mööda tühermaad aastakümneid, enne kui need taastati.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotDuraframe.label: Eyebot vastupidav raam
LanguageData.RobCo_EyeOfHydra.description: Kompaktne drooniüksus, mis on loodud ja juhitud Hydra käsuplatvormi poolt. Sellel on fokuseeritud energialõhkaja ja see töötab oma põhiseadme allutatud koordineerimisel. Üksikud Eye of Hydra üksused on kergelt soomustatud, kuid ründavad arvukalt mitme nurga alt korraga. Vanem Hydra hävitamine viib nad tagasi põhiliste autonoomse rünnakuprotokolli juurde.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyeOfHydra.label: Hydra silm
LanguageData.RobCo_GutsyHydra.description: Tugevalt modifitseeritud Mister Gutsyl põhinev platvorm, mis on loodud töötama droonikäsukeskusena. Hydral on integreeritud süsteem Eye of Hydra üksuste paigutamiseks ja koordineerimiseks, mille lahingutõhusust suurendab keskplatvormilt edastatav taktikaline aura. Tema enda relvade hulk on märkimisväärne ja selle hävitamine häirib kõiki selle kasutusele võetud droone.
LanguageData.RobCo_GutsyHydra.label: Hüdra
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNanny.description: Mister Handy variant, mis on mõeldud lapsehoolduseks ja koduseks järelevalveks. See on programmeeritud ulatusliku käitumispaketiga, mis hõlmab imikute hooldamist, ohtude tuvastamist, etiketti ja distsiplinaarprotokolle. Miss Nanny säilitab koduse kaitse jaoks mõeldud laserkäe ja seda turustati sõjaeelsetele peredele spetsiaalse lapsehoolduslahendusena.
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNanny.label: Preili Nanny
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterFarmhand.description: Mister Handy seade, mis on ümber seadistatud põllumajandustöödeks. See on varustatud istutamiseks, saagikoristuseks ja põlluhoolduseks sobivate tööriistaharudega ning saagi jälgimise anduritega. Sõjaeelsele põllutööle müüdud Mister Farmhand säilitab töökoha kaitsmiseks laserkäe.
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterFarmhand.label: Härra Farmhand
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsy.description: Mister Handy platvormi militariseeritud variant, mille tellis Ameerika Ühendriikide armee. See asendab tsiviiltööriistad plasmaratta ja leegiheitjaga ning juhib isiksusepaketti Seersant Major v1.0. Mister Gutsyl on raskemad soomused kui tavalisel Handyl ja seda kasutati lahingupiirkondades, sealhulgas Anchorage'i rindel.
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsy.label: Härra Gutsy
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandy.description: Hõljuv koduteenija robot, mille toodab General Atomics International koostöös ettevõttega RobCo Industries. See on varustatud kolme liigendvarrega, mis mahutavad tööriistade kinnitusi, sealhulgas sae, laserlõikur ja leegiheitja, ning kolme optilise varrega. Selle närvivõrk võimaldab peaaegu mõistvat vestlust ja hästi hooldatud seade on võimeline iseseisvalt toimima sajandeid.
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandy.label: Härra Handy
LanguageData.RobCo_GutsyHydraArray.tools.0.label: ripper
LanguageData.RobCo_MissNannyBlaster.tools.0.label: manipulaatori käsi
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterGutsyArray.tools.0.label: ripper
LanguageData.RobCo_MisterHandyBlaster.tools.0.label: saetera
LanguageData.MechanoidTransponder.label: RobCo Transponder
LanguageData.NanostructuringChip.label: ammendatud Sentry Bot Fusion Core
LanguageData.PowerfocusChip.label: jäägid Assaultroni pea
LanguageData.SignalChip.description: Endiselt Mister Handy tõukuri funktsionaalsed osad.
LanguageData.SignalChip.label: päästetud Handy tõukurid
LanguageData.SubcoreBasic.label: põhiahel
LanguageData.SubcoreRegular.label: sõjaväeline vooluring
LanguageData.UnfinishedSubcore.label: lõpetamata RobCo Osad
LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator.description: Väike neljajalgne lahingurobot, mis on seotud Hiina Rahvaste Ühenduse fraktsioonidega. See on ehitatud ühe integreeritud laserrelva ja nelja mehaanilise jala ümber kiireks liikumiseks ebatasasel maastikul. Liberator on kergelt soomustatud, kuid kiire ning seda kohtab tavaliselt suurtes rühmades, kes ründavad samaaegselt mitmest suunast.
LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator.label: vabastaja
LanguageData.RobCo_LiberatorLaser.description: Sõjalise kvaliteediga laserpüss, mis on integreeritud Hiina lahingurobotisse Liberator.
LanguageData.RobCo_LiberatorLaser.label: vabastaja laserpüss
LanguageData.RobCo_LiberatorLaser.tools.0.label: servo käed
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime.description: Massiivne sõjaeelne sõjamasin, mille töötasid ühiselt välja RobCo Industries ja General Atomics International Ameerika Ühendriikide armee jaoks. See on umbes kakskümmend meetrit kõrge ja varustatud kahe peaga kinnitatavate energiakahuritega ja taktikaliste tuumapommidega kindlustatud positsioonide hävitamiseks. Algselt mõeldud Anchorage'i vabastamiseks Hiina vägedest, kuid seda ei kasutatud kunagi enne Suurt sõda toiteallika rikete tõttu.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime.label: Liberty Prime
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeMiniNukeLauncher.descr: Liberty Prime'i integreeritud suure energiaga impulsskahur, mis jätab minituumaheite oma spetsiaalsele stardisüsteemile.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeMiniNukeLauncher.label: liberty prime impulsskahur
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_BallisticAuto.label: ballistiline autopurse
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserMedium.label: keskmise kiirga laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LibertyPrimePulse.label: vabaduse peaimpulss
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SecuritronRocket.label: Securitron rakett
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_WarMachinePulse.label: sõjamasina impulss
LanguageData.RobCo_PlatinumChip.description: Plaatinast andmesalvestuskiip on taastatud suletud RobCo haldusvarahoidlast. See sisaldab sõjaeelset RobCo operatsioonisüsteemi paketti ja on väärtuslik metallist palju rohkem kui oma kaalust.
LanguageData.RobCo_PlatinumChip.label: plaatina kiip
LanguageData.RobCo_Collectron.description: Ressursi kogumiseks ja päästmiseks ümber programmeeritud Protectroni variant. Erinevad sõjajärgsed fraktsioonid võtsid selle kasutusele, et automatiseerida konkreetsete materjalide kogumist. Collectron töötab autonoomselt määratletud piirkonnas ja kaitseb oma kogumistsooni häirete eest.
LanguageData.RobCo_Collectron.label: kollektor
LanguageData.RobCo_Constructron.description: Protectroni seade, mis on konfigureeritud ehitus- ja infrastruktuuritöödeks. Sellel on tavaliste käsilaserite asemel keevitus- ja montaažitööriistad ning seda kasutati sõjaeelsetel ehitusplatsidel ja tööstusrajatistes. Standardsed ohule reageerimise protokollid jäävad aktiivseks.
LanguageData.RobCo_Constructron.label: konstrukton
LanguageData.RobCo_Factotron.description: A Protectron variant programmed for factory and manufacturing tasks. It was designed to operate on assembly lines and production floors, performing a wide range of manufacturing sub-tasks with precision. Factotrons are among the less commonly encountered Protectron variants in the post-war wasteland.
LanguageData.RobCo_Factotron.label: Faktotron
LanguageData.RobCo_Protectron.description: Laialdaselt kasutusele võetud sõjaeelne utiliit ja turvarobot, mille tootis RobCo Industries. Sellel on suur kuplikujuline pea koos kolme optilise anduriga, kaks käsitsi paigaldatud laserkiirgurit ja pealaser. Lõhustumispatarei jõul töötavat Protectroni kasutati kontorites, haiglates ja avalikes asutustes kogu Ameerika Ühendriikides. See on aeglane ja otseses lahingus vähem võimekas kui spetsiaalsed sõjaväerobotid.
LanguageData.RobCo_Protectron.label: Protectron
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron.description: A Protectron unit fitted with a heavy drill attachment in place of a standard hand laser, intended for mining and excavation work. It was contracted to pre-War mining operations for subterranean resource extraction. The drill arm makes it slower than a standard Protectron but gives it significant close-quarters capability.
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron.label: utilitron
LanguageData.RobCo_Utilitron.tools.0.label: puurida
LanguageData.RobCo_BrokenEyebotFrame.description: Eyeboti katkised tükid. Mehaanik saab neid osi uurida, et aidata avada RobCo uurimistöö kõrgemaid tasemeid.
LanguageData.RobCo_BrokenEyebotFrame.label: katkine Eyeboti raam
LanguageData.RobCo_BurnoutMechlinkBooster.label: RobCo antenn
LanguageData.RobCo_CommsConsole.label: RobCo sidekonsool
LanguageData.RobCo_MechbandDish.label: RobCo roog
LanguageData.RobCo_Receiver.label: RobCo vastuvõtja
LanguageData.RobCo_Robobrain.description: Suur roomiklahingrobot, mille General Atomics International toodab Ameerika Ühendriikide armee jaoks.
